text: INFLATION: US CPI surges to 3.3% annually — gasoline prices up 21.2% in one month. War-driven oil shock is primary driver. Consumer sentiment at record low.

sources.name: CNN — Iran war oil shock pushes US inflation to 3.3%

text: CONGRESS: House GOP blocks Democratic effort to force vote on Iran war powers resolution. Speaker Pro Tempore gavels session closed without allowing debate.

sources.name: Democracy Now — House GOP blocks war powers vote

text: KHARAZI DEATH: Former Iranian FM Kamal Kharazi (81) dies from wounds sustained in April 1 US-Israeli airstrike on his Tehran home. Wife killed in same strike.

sources.name: Jerusalem Post — Kharazi dies from strike wounds

text: DIPLOMACY: Saudi FM holds first call with Iranian FM Araghchi since war began — discusses reducing tensions. Araghchi warns it would be 'dumb' for US to let Netanyahu 'kill diplomacy' via Lebanon strikes.

sources.name: Al Arabiya — Saudi FM call with Iranian counterpart
Al Jazeera — Iran says 'dumb' for US to let Netanyahu kill diplomacy

text: ISLAMABAD: Iranian delegation (Ghalibaf, Araghchi, SNSC Sec. Ahmadian) arrives at Nur Khan Airbase under aerial escort. Talks with US team (Vance, Witkoff, Kushner) set for Saturday at Serena Hotel. Pakistan PM Sharif: 'make-or-break moment.'

sources.name: IranWire — Iranian delegation arrives under aerial escort
Free Malaysia Today — Iranian delegation arrives in Pakistan

text: TRUMP WARNS: Tells NY Post warships 'loading up' with 'best ammunition ever made' — threatens fresh strikes if talks fail. Says military will hit Iran 'even better than what we did previously and we blew them apart.'

sources.name: Manila Times — Trump warns of fresh strikes if talks fail
Asharq Al-Awsat — Trump warns fresh strikes

text: PRECONDITIONS: Ghalibaf demands Lebanon ceasefire + release of frozen Iranian assets BEFORE Islamabad negotiations begin. Accuses US/Israel of 3 ceasefire violations: Lebanon attacks, drone in Iranian airspace, denial of enrichment rights.

sources.name: CNBC — Iran sets preconditions for talks
Daily Signal — Iran demands Lebanon ceasefire before talks

text: HORMUZ: Only 6 vessels transited April 10 (down from 7). 600+ vessels stranded including 325 tankers. UAE oil CEO: 'Hormuz is not open.' Russian-flagged tanker made it through. Blockade Day 39.

sources.name: NBC News — Hormuz shipping at standstill
The Week — 6 vessels passed through Hormuz

text: ISLAMABAD: VP Vance arrives in Pakistan to lead US delegation for Saturday peace talks with Iran. First face-to-face US-Iran negotiations since 1979. Iranian delegation already in place at Serena Hotel.

sources.name: Al Jazeera — US-Iran talks in Pakistan live
Euronews — Vance warns Iran

text: OIL: WTI drops sharply to $95.50 (-3.6% on day) as Brent-WTI spread normalizes. Brent at $96.69 (flat). Goldman warns $100+ Brent all year if Hormuz shut another month. JPMorgan: $150 if shut into mid-May.

sources.name: Trading Economics — Brent crude
CNBC — Oil prices

text: IMF: Warns of 'lasting economic damage' from Iran war — global growth permanently reduced. World Bank cuts Middle East growth to 1.8%. ECB warns of stagflation risk. S&P 500 best week since November (+3.6%).

sources.name: Euronews — IMF warns lasting economic damage

text: ISRAEL COSTS: Finance Ministry estimates $17.5B war costs for 40 days on Iran + Lebanon. Knesset approved record $45.8B defense budget + $13B supplemental. Up from $15B at 35 days.

sources.name: Middle East Monitor — Israel estimates $17.5B cost

text: SPR: DOE issues new RFP for 30M barrel emergency exchange from Strategic Petroleum Reserve. Previous 10M exchange April 1. Total IEA coordinated release: 400M barrels — largest in history.

sources.name: DOE — SPR emergency exchange

text: DC TALKS: Rubio organizing 3-way Israel-Lebanon-US talks in Washington for April 14. Lebanese PM Salam expected to visit next week. Israeli ambassador says Israel won't 'discuss ceasefire with Hezbollah.'

sources.name: CBS News — Lebanon Israel ceasefire talks in US
Axios — Israel-Lebanon negotiations

text: KIRYAT SHMONA: Hezbollah rocket hits building in northern Israel on Day 43 — continuing strikes despite Iran ceasefire. Lebanon front remains active with 5 IDF divisions deployed.

sources.name: LiveUAMap Lebanon — Building hit by Hezbollah missile

text: SAFED: Hezbollah fires 30+ rockets at northern Israel — direct hit on Safed parking lot, MDA ambulance damaged, 1,500-year-old Byzantine church in Nahariya hit. No injuries. Hezbollah claims retaliation for ceasefire violations.

sources.name: Jerusalem Post — Rocket hits parking lot in Safed
Haaretz — Hezbollah rockets cause heavy damage

text: LEBANON: Israeli strikes kill 13 on April 11 — 3 in Mefdoun dawn raid, 10 in Nabatiyeh including 3 emergency workers (1 civil defense, 2 Islamic Health Committee paramedics). 54+ emergency workers killed since March 2.

sources.name: NBC News — Live updates: Vance arrives for peace talks
Times of Israel — Liveblog April 11

text: HORMUZ MINES: US officials reveal Iran CANNOT FIND its own mines in Strait of Hormuz — drifted from original positions. Iran releases navigational maps (first mine acknowledgment). Clearance estimated 6-10 weeks. Only 9 ships transited Thursday.

sources.name: Japan Times — Iran unable to find mines in Hormuz
Jerusalem Post — Iran lost track of mine locations

text: ARAGHCHI: Iran enters Islamabad talks with 'complete distrust' toward US due to 'repeated breaches of commitment.' Warns Tehran could abandon ceasefire if Israeli strikes on Lebanon continue.

sources.name: PressTV — Iran enters talks with complete distrust

text: FROZEN ASSETS: Iran claims US agreed to release frozen assets in Qatar as 'sign of seriousness.' Senior US official denies it to CBS News. Dispute deepens mistrust ahead of Saturday talks.

sources.name: Al-Monitor — Iranian source says US agreed to release frozen assets

text: CPI: March 2026 inflation surges to 3.3% (from 2.4%). Gas prices +21.2% MoM — largest spike since 1967. Energy costs +10.9%. Consumer sentiment plummets to 47.6, lowest on record since 1952.

sources.name: CNN Business — CPI report: US inflation tripled
CNBC — CPI inflation March 2026 breakdown

text: HEGSETH DISPUTED: Army survivors from 103rd Sustainment Command contradict Defense Sec Hegseth's account of deadly Iranian strike in Kuwait. Survivors say base was unprepared; 'painting a picture that one squeaked through is a falsehood.'

sources.name: New Republic — Army survivors say Hegseth is lying

text: HISTORIC: First direct US-Iran face-to-face peace talks since 1979 begin in Islamabad. VP Vance leads US side; Ghalibaf and Araghchi lead Iran's 71-member delegation. Talks enter 'detailed, technical phase.' No agreements yet.

sources.name: NPR — U.S.-Iran peace talks underway in Islamabad
Al Jazeera — US-Iran direct talks on ending war under way in Pakistan

text: HORMUZ: USS Peterson and USS Murphy transit Strait of Hormuz — first US warships since war began. CENTCOM begins mine clearance. Iran calls it ceasefire violation, threatens attack 'within 30 minutes.'

sources.name: Axios — U.S. warships cross Strait of Hormuz for first time since Iran war began
USNI News — Two U.S. Warships Sail Through Strait of Hormuz

text: CHINA ARMS: CNN exclusive — US intelligence says China preparing to deliver MANPADs to Iran via third countries. Would mark major escalation in China's direct support. China denies.

sources.name: CNN — US intelligence: China preparing weapons shipment to Iran

text: TRUMP WARNING: '24 hours' to determine if Islamabad talks succeed. Warships being 'reloaded with the best ammunition.' Strikes could resume if negotiations fail.

sources.name: Military Times — US military begins clearing Strait of Hormuz, Trump says

text: LEBANON: Netanyahu formally rejects ceasefire with Hezbollah ahead of Washington talks Tuesday. IDF kills 10+ in southern Lebanon today. Lebanon toll: 2,020 killed, 6,436 wounded since March 2.

sources.name: Al Jazeera — Israel rejects ceasefire with Hezbollah ahead of Lebanon talks

text: AL-AQSA: Over 100,000 worshippers at first Friday prayers after 40-day wartime closure. Mosque had been shut even during Ramadan.

sources.name: Times of Israel — Over 100,000 Muslim worshipers at Al-Aqsa

text: NO DEAL: Islamabad talks Day 1 concludes after 14+ hours with NO agreement. Strait of Hormuz control is key sticking point. Some progress on Lebanon ceasefire conditions and frozen assets. Day 2 continues Sunday.

sources.name: CNBC — U.S.-Iran peace summit concludes with no deal
Washington Post — Direct U.S.-Iran talks stretch past midnight

text: TRUMP: 'Whether we make a deal or not makes no difference to me. Regardless what happens, we win.' Warships 'loading up with the best weapons ever made.' Strait will reopen 'with or without Iran's cooperation.'

sources.name: NBC News — Trump: 'a whole civilization will die'

text: POPE: Leo XIV denounces 'delusion of omnipotence' fueling war at St. Peter's peace vigil — strongest papal statement yet. Calls for 'breaking the demonic cycle of evil.' Widely interpreted as directed at Washington.

sources.name: AP/WSLS — Pope Leo XIV blasts 'delusion of omnipotence'

text: RUBIO: Arrests 3 Iranian nationals tied to 1979 hostage crisis figure 'Screaming Mary' (Masoumeh Ebtekar). Green cards revoked; ICE detains Seyed Eissa Hashemi, Maryam Tahmasebi, and son. Entered US on Obama-era visas.

sources.name: State Dept — Rubio Terminates Green Cards
Fox News — ICE detains relatives of 1979 hostage crisis figure

text: EU SANCTIONS: Kallas announces sanctions on 19 Iranian officials/entities for human rights violations. Urges ceasefire extension to Lebanon and freedom of navigation in Hormuz.

sources.name: The National — EU's Kallas warns of 'slippery slope' if Iran controls Hormuz

text: KHAMENEI: Mojtaba Khamenei warns 'our hands are on the trigger,' threatens 'new phase.' Claims Iran achieved 'final victory' and 'astonished the world.' Marks 40 days since father Ali Khamenei killed.

sources.name: The News (Pakistan) — Khamenei warns 'our hands are on the trigger'

text: NETANYAHU: Demands Hezbollah disarmament for Lebanon peace 'that will last for generations.' Sets two preconditions: dismantling weapons + real peace agreement. Lebanon-Israel-US talks Tuesday in Washington.

sources.name: Manila Times — Israel PM wants Lebanon peace deal 'for generations'

text: PEZESHKIAN: Iranian president vows delegation will 'negotiate bravely' at Islamabad talks. 'Whatever the outcome, the government will stand by the people.' Voices full backing for negotiating team.

sources.name: ANI News — Pezeshkian vows to 'negotiate bravely'

text: ISLAMABAD TALKS COLLAPSE: Vance announces NO DEAL after 21 hours of marathon negotiations. Leaves 'final and best offer' for Iran. Key sticking points: nuclear weapons commitment + Hormuz control. Vance: 'That's bad news for Iran much more than for the US.' Departs aboard Air Force Two.

sources.name: NPR — Pakistan peace talks fail after 21 hours
Newsweek — Vance says 21-hour Iran talks end with no deal

text: IRAN RESPONSE: Foreign Ministry says 'the ball is in America's court.' Claims two sides 'agreed on several points' but 'disagreements on two important issues' remain. Ghalibaf calls US negotiations 'unreasonable.' Iran in 'no rush' to return to table.

sources.name: DimSumDaily — Iran says the ball is in America's court
Times of Israel — Ghalibaf says negotiations unreasonable

text: IRGC 'LAST WARNING': Strongly denies US warship transit of Hormuz. Vows 'strong response' to any foreign military vessels. 'The initiative for passage of any vessel is in the hands of the Armed Forces of the Islamic Republic of Iran.'

sources.name: Fortune — Iran's 'last warning' to US warships
ANI — Iran denies US claims of mine-clearing passage

text: NETANYAHU TRIAL: Court rejects PM's request to delay corruption trial testimony TWICE. Justice Friedman-Feldman found 'insufficient justification.' Trial resumes Sunday. Netanyahu cited 'classified security and diplomatic reasons.'

sources.name: Times of Israel — Court rejects PM's request to delay trial
Middle East Eye — Netanyahu trial resumes Sunday

text: ISRAEL ESCALATION: Israel approves updated target list for energy/infrastructure strikes on Iran if diplomacy fails. Iran warns reciprocal attacks could 'plunge the entire region into darkness' — identifies Orot Rabin power plant (25% of Israel's electricity) as target.

sources.name: YNet — Israel preparing to attack energy facilities

text: HEZBOLLAH RECORD: Alma Research Center reports 105 attack waves on Israel April 11 — most intense day since war began. Drone struck Shlomi apartment building. IDF 98th Division in direct clashes with Hezbollah in Bint Jbeil center.

sources.name: JPost — Northern Israel hit with rockets, drones
L'Orient Today — Hezbollah reports direct clashes in Bint Jbeil

text: LEBANON STRIKES: Israeli overnight airstrikes kill at least 24 across southern Lebanon — 13 in Teffahta, 5 in Qana, 6 in Maaroub. Dawn strikes hit 5 more towns. Strikes intensifying after Islamabad talks collapse.

sources.name: Xinhua — Israeli airstrikes kill 24 in southern Lebanon overnight
The National — Israeli strikes intensify amid failed peace talks

text: HORMUZ BREAKTHROUGH: 3 VLCCs (Serifos, Cospearl Lake, He Rong Hai) exit Strait of Hormuz — BIGGEST day of oil movement since war began (~6M barrels). Cospearl Lake laden with Iraqi oil bound for China.

sources.name: Al Jazeera — Oil tankers exit Strait of Hormuz amid fragile ceasefire
Bloomberg — Three oil supertankers sail through Hormuz

text: TANKER U-TURNS: 2 empty supertankers (Agios Fanourios I, Shalamar) make U-turns in Hormuz IMMEDIATELY after talks collapse. Signal renewed market panic. Goldman: $100+ Brent if Hormuz shut another month. JPMorgan: $150 if shut into mid-May.

sources.name: Bloomberg — Two supertankers U-turn in Hormuz as US-Iran talks break down

text: NO NEXT ROUND: Fars News reports Iran has 'no plan for next round of negotiations' after 21-hour Islamabad collapse. Ceasefire expires ~April 22. Iran FM: 'ball in America's court.' Consumer sentiment hit ALL-TIME RECORD LOW 47.6.

sources.name: NPR — No Deal: US-Iran peace talks in Islamabad collapse
Al Jazeera — US and Iran fail to reach deal after marathon talks

text: BLOCKADE: Trump announces 'effective immediately' US Navy will BLOCKADE all ships entering or leaving the Strait of Hormuz. Orders Navy to interdict vessels that paid Iran tolls and destroy Iranian mines. 'We are fully LOCKED AND LOADED.'

sources.name: Bloomberg — Trump says US will begin blockade of ships to and from Hormuz
CNBC — Trump says US will blockade Strait of Hormuz

text: IRAN DEFIANT: 'Hormuz will not be opened.' IRGC vows to 'deprive Americans and allies of regional oil and gas for years.' Iran warns US blockade would 'disastrously backfire.' No plan for next round of talks.

sources.name: Al Jazeera — Iran war live updates
BusinessToday — Iran warns Trump against blockade

text: NETANYAHU: Campaign against Iran 'is not over' — 'we have historic achievements.' Claims Israel killed 12 nuclear scientists. 'They wanted to strangle us, and we are strangling them.'

sources.name: Times of Israel — Netanyahu says campaign against Iran 'not over'

text: IRGC 'DEADLY VORTEX': Iran posts crosshairs video, warns any military vessels approaching Hormuz 'will be considered a ceasefire violation and dealt with harshly.' Claims strait under 'smart control and management.'

sources.name: Middle East Eye — IRGC threatens to trap enemies in 'deadly vortex' at Hormuz
Pakistan Today — IRGC warns military vessels will be treated as ceasefire breach

text: IDF 200 STRIKES: Israel carried out 200 airstrikes on Hezbollah targets in Lebanon in past 24 hours — Bint Jbeil, Siddiqin, Nabatieh, multiple Tyre district locations. 35 killed, 152 wounded. Lebanon death toll now 2,055.

sources.name: Middle East Monitor — Lebanon says 35 killed in past 24 hours, death toll rises to 2,055
The National — Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon intensify

text: RECORD DAY: Hezbollah launched 105 attack waves on Israel April 12 — most intense day since war began. Total since Feb 28: 1,084 attack waves. 1 woman killed, 2 injured in northern Israel rocket barrage.

sources.name: Wikipedia — 2026 Lebanon war (sourced from IDF/Hezbollah claims)

text: UK REJECTS BLOCKADE: Britain explicitly refuses to join US naval blockade of Hormuz. Working with France on alternative 40-nation freedom-of-navigation coalition instead.

sources.name: Middle East Monitor — UK will not join US blockade of Strait of Hormuz
Pakistan Today — UK says will not join US blockade

text: PEZESHKIAN-PUTIN CALL: Iran president tells Putin 'biggest obstacle' was 'double standards and hegemonic approach of the American side.' Putin offers to mediate, supports Iran demand for war reparations.

sources.name: PressTV — Pezeshkian, Putin discuss ways to restore regional peace
Moscow Times — Putin ready to help peace efforts in call with Iran president
